name: Dream fish
detailed_description:
This is a simple game!

When you enter the game interface

You will own a lot of land

Every interval of time. The treasure chest can be opened

When you open the treasure chest, you will receive random items

You can place the items on the land

They will give you resources (sapphires or rubies)

When you place the same items together, you will receive higher-level items

The higher the level of an item, the more gems you will receive at regular intervals

You can use resources to cultivate land
